title: lantana aculeata f. mista
intro: Lantana aculeata f. mista, also known as the yellow shrub or lantana, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of lantana aculeata f. mista include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
